allow: Bash(ssh root@95.164.92.165 "docker exec planner-bro-excalidraw-app-1 find /usr/share/nginx/html -name ''Assistant*.woff2'' 2>/dev/null; echo ''=== fonts/ subdir ===''; docker exec planner-bro-excalidraw-app-1 ls /usr/share/nginx/html/fonts/ 2>/dev/null; echo ''=== Check what URLs JS uses for fonts ===''; docker exec planner-bro-excalidraw-app-1 grep -r ''Assistant'' /usr/share/nginx/html/assets/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo ''not in assets''; docker exec planner-bro-excalidraw-app-1 grep -rl ''fonts/Assistant'' /usr/share/nginx/html/ 2>/dev/null | head -10")
